blocks.text: Match preview: Sri Lanka U19 face India U19 in 3rd unofficial ODI (ODI) on Thu, 9 Jul, 2026, 10:00 am at Mahinda Rajapaksa International Stadium Hambantota. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka U19 vs India U19
India U19 tour of Sri Lanka 2026

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 36°C / Low 27°C · Rain: 0.3 mm · Wind: up to 26 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
